events.title: Love and Logic: "Magic for Early Childhood" Eight-Week Parenting Course
events.venue_name: Child Development Center at Sierra College Campus
events.description: This supportive class provides practical, effective strategies for raising young children with love, patience, and consistency. Discover proven solutions that help little ones to thrive while reducing stress for parents. For 48 years, Love and Logic has guided parents with simple, actionable tools to help manage early childhood challenges while building strong, loving relationships. Topics include: – Setting and keeping loving limits – Teaching young kids to listen the first time – Managing pott
events.venue_address: Child Development Center at Sierra College Campus, 250 Sierra College Drive, Grass Valley, 95945

events.title: Truckee Trivia Tuesdays at Alibi Ale Works
events.description: Truckee trivia Tuesdays! It just rolls right off the tongue, doesn’t it? Please come join our host, Craig, for a night full of brain busters and beer from 6:00 – 8:00 pm. Craig (the longest-standing trivia host in Truckee) creates all of the questions from scratch! So grab some friends and head over to Alibi Truckee for a chance to win a $50 Alibi gift card at our weekly Truckee Trivia.
events.venue_address: Alibi Ale Works – Truckee, 10069 Bridge Street, Truckee, CA, 96161, United States

events.title: Mountain Stream Meditation: "Sitting and Sangha" Weekly Meeting
events.description: Sitting and Sangha is a weekly in-person only meeting for group practice and discussion of dharma topics from 6:30 – 8:00 pm weekly on Tuesdays at Mountain Stream Meditation in Nevada City. Meetings are facilitated by senior dharma practitioners and community leaders. The group is inspired by the framework of a Kalyana Mitta (spiritual friendship) group, and the intention is to create a supportive and friendly environment for sharing and spiritual connection. The emphasis on the third jewel (San
events.venue_address: Mountain Stream Meditation, 710 Zion Stret, Nevada City, CA, 95959, United States

events.title: Special Nevada County Helpers Open-Mic Potluck, Theme: "Matriarchs and Elders"
events.description: The Nevada County Helpers Open-Mic Potluck is on from 3:00 – 8:00 pm on Wednesday, March 4th at the Seaman’s Lodge in Nevada City. The theme is “Matriarchs and Elders” – please bring a dish that’s part of your family’s traditions. Sign-up for the 0pen-mic starts at 3:00 pm, with performances taking place from 4:00 – 7:00 pm. The emcee is Chris French, and this event is hosted by members of United Domestic Workers. We’ll be collecting clothing and ability aids for our disabled neighbors. There wi
events.venue_address: Seaman’s Lodge, 427 Nimrod, Nevada City, 95959

events.title: Rodney Crowell Brings his Airline Highway Tour to the Center for the Arts
events.description: Rodney Crowell is the songwriter’s songwriter — a Grammy-winning Texan troubadour whose songs have been sung by legends from Johnny Cash to Emmylou Harris. Over four decades, Crowell has crafted a remarkable catalog of hits while helping define the Americana sound, blending literary storytelling with timeless melodies. From his early days alongside Townes Van Zandt and Guy Clark to collaborations with Willie Nelson, Steve Earle, and Rosanne Cash, Crowell’s music captures the heart of American ro
events.venue_address: The Center for the Arts, 314 W. Main Street, Grass Valley, CA, 95945, United States

events.venue_name: Nevada City Odd Fellows Seven Stars Gallery

events.title: Mountain Stream Meditation: "Open Temple Fridays"
events.description: Each Friday, Mountain Stream Meditation in Nevada City opens the doors from 11:30 am to 1:00 pm for Open Temple Fridays as follows: – The center is open from 11:30 am – 1:15 pm. – Silent meditation is from 12:30 – 1:00 pm. This is a chance to enjoy Sangha and tea, recharge with a new (or old) book from our library, and practice together. On occasion, teachers may offer pop-up Dharma discussions as well. Thank you for all the ways you participate and for your generosity! We are also calling for v
events.venue_address: Mountain Stream Meditation, 710 Zion Stret, Nevada City, CA, 95959, United States

events.title: "The Winters Where Catfish Sings": Exhibition by Sokthea Chan at Axis Gallery
events.description: The Winters Where Catfish Sings is a solo exhibition by Sokthea Chan that introduces a body of work inspired by the natural world, mythological stories, and poetry – from Friday, March 6th through Sunday, March 29th. The second Saturday reception will be from 5:00 – 8:00 pm on March 14th. The title of the exhibition draws its inspiration from cultural folklore that gives slight humor and sorrow to let the viewers to wonder and question its silly, bizarre name in relation to the work. Sokthea bel
events.venue_address: Axis Gallery, 625 S Street, Sacramento, CA, 95811, United States

events.title: "Dreamscapes in Bloom": a Collaborative Exhibition at Axis Gallery
events.description: Cara Gregor and Elise Mahan present Dreamscapes in Bloom, a collaborative exhibition celebrating color and imagination, from Friday, March 6th through Sunday, March 29th at the Axis Gallery in Sacramento. events.venue_address: Axis Gallery, 625 S Street, Sacramento, CA, 95811, United States

events.title: Nevada County Jewish Community Center Family Shabbat
events.description: Please join us at the Nevada County Jewish Community Center (NCJCC) for our monthly family Shabbat dinner and service from 5:30 to 7:30 pm on Friday, March 6th! All are welcome, bring your family and friends. For more information, please click here: https://ncjcc.org/events/event/family-shabbat-dinner-and-service/. Kindly RSVP ahead of time, so we can plan for enough food, by calling (530) 477-0922, emailing ncjcc@outlook.com, or visiting our Facebook page here: https://www.facebook.com/events/1
events.venue_address: Nevada County Jewish Community Center, 506 Walsh St., Grass Valley, CA, 94945, United States

events.title: Beers and Bishops: Truckee Chess Night at Alibi Ale Works
events.description: Please join us from 6:00 – 8:00 pm every first Friday of the month at Truckee Chess Night at Alibi Ale Works! Bring a chess board and your brain. Let’s play chess and drink beer!! Oh, we eat food too.
events.venue_address: Alibi Ale Works – Truckee, 10069 Bridge Street, Truckee, CA, 96161, United States

events.title: Mylar's Hippie Hour at the Torch Club
events.description: Every first Friday of the month, William Mylar (with special guests), performs free-form, unrehearsed, live music from 6:00 – 8:00 pm at the Torch Club in midtown Sacramento. From original songs, to covers of all genres, no two shows have ever been the same for 15 years. Always no cover, and free munchies. NOTE: these are 21 and over events.
events.venue_address: Torch Club, 904 15th St, Sacramento, CA, 95814, United States

events.title: Protect Our Winters Fundraising Event at Alibi Ale Works in Truckee
events.description: Please join Patagonia ambassadors Nick Russell, Forrest Shearer, and Brooklyn Bell from 6:00 – 8:00 pm on Friday, March 6th at Truckee’s Alibi Ale Works as they share their favorite stories and latest projects, all while enjoying beer, food, music, a gear raffle, and more! This is a fundraiser for Protect Our Winters (POW) – 100% of your donation supports POW, and serves as your ticket for entry. The suggested donation starts at a low level, but there is no set amount. events.venue_address: Alibi Ale Works – Truckee, 10069 Bridge Street, Truckee, CA, 96161, United States

events.venue_address: Wild Eye Pub, 535 Mill Street, Grass Valley, CA, 95945, United States

events.title: Mountain Stream Meditation: Weekly "Room to Breathe" Recovery Sangha
events.description: The Buddha taught that due to craving, greed, anger, and confusion, the mind may be a source of great suffering. Room to Breathe is a peer-led, in-person weekly recovery sangha – where we explore a Buddhist approach to recovery from addictions of all kinds using the practices and principles of the Four Noble Truths and the Eightfold Path. We use the Recovery Dharma format, emphasizing the “three jewels” of the Buddhist practice: the Buddha (the potential for our own awakening), the Dharma (the t
events.venue_address: Mountain Stream Meditation, 710 Zion Stret, Nevada City, CA, 95959, United States

events.title: Terra Bonne: Recording a Live Music Video at the Wild Eye
events.description: Terra Bonne Band would love you to be a part of their live studio audience as part of tonight’s special video recording from 6:30 – 8:30 pm on Friday, March 6th at Wild Eye Pub! Please come and enjoy great front porch zydeco cajun road trip music from this fun crew, who are: Seinin Markee (drums and percussion), Nichole DeLuz (accordion and vocals), Ron Schwilke (dobro, bass, and vocals), John Lace (piano and melodica), Josh Kling (fiddle), Dave Giguere (guitar and vocals), with big appreciation
events.venue_address: Wild Eye Pub, 535 Mill St, Grass Valley, CA, 95945, United States

events.title: BrokenBass at the Crazy Horse
events.description: Please join us for a night of multi-genre bass-forward electronic dance music brought to you by Bartek Industries, co-curator of Evolv3 Drum and Bass, from 9:30 pm – 1:00 am on Friday, March 6th at the Crazy Horse in downtown Nevada City! Expect deep body bass with funky grooves to make you move. Your selectors for the evening are: j9 the Angel (Space Cowboys, Angels of Bass, Fraktured), MasterKat (Something Like This, Tahoe Techno Collective), Bartek Industries (Evovl3 DnB, Moontribe, Fraktured
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, CA, 95959, United States

events.title: NorCal Resist: Monthly Free Auto Light Check and Repair
events.description: On the first Saturday of every month, a group of local volunteers will test and replace: brake lights, head lights, turn signals, and running lights for free. 10:00 am – 2:00 pm at the Sierra Gold Community Senior Center in Grass Valley. We provide all the lights!
events.venue_address: Sierra Gold Community Senior Center, 231 Colfax Avenue, Grass Valley, CA, 95945, United States

events.title: Las Ninas Muertas: a Happy Hour Show at the Crazy Horse
events.description: Tucked away in the foothills of California, a band of renegade women honor the music of the Grateful Dead. Las Ninas Muertas, a five-piece, mostly acoustic band plays your favorite Dead tunes. Imbued with the spirit of love for this timeless songbook, Las Ninas Muertas sing in four-part harmony, with searing harmonica and electric guitar riffs, the twang of banjo, and the twinkle of mandolin all sitting on the foundation of upright bass. Las Ninas Muertas invite you to dance, sing along, and com
events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, CA, 95959, United States

events.title: Nevada County Skate: Second Annual Spaghetti Feed Fundraiser
events.description: Please join us for a night of good food, good company, and a great cause from 6:00 – 9:00 pm on Saturday, March 7th at the Grass Valley Elks Lodge! Nevada County Skate (NCS) invites you to our Second Annual Spaghetti Feed, benefiting lights, seating, shade, and a memorial for the brand-new Grass Valley Skate Park, proudly designed and built by Grindline Skateparks. events.venue_address: Grass Valley Elks Lodge, 109 South School Street, Grass Valley, CA, 95945, United States

events.venue_address: Crazy Horse Saloon, 230 Commercial Street, Nevada City, CA, 95959, United States
